codeReview.summary: The feature correctly wires env-based backend selection and invalid-value handling, but it does not satisfy the required backend parity behaviors. In cloud mode, storage/state operations are still stubbed as :not_implemented, and at least one API path can break due to type mismatch, so API/CRUD behavior is not identical across backends.

issues.description: Cloud backend CRUD operations still return `{:error, :not_implemented}` for read/write/list/delete/exists? (lines 13, 18, 23, 28, 33), which violates the feature requirement that CRUD behavior work identically across local and cloud backends (VAL-CFGSW-007).

`get_space/2` places `Storage.exists?/3` directly into JSON as `filled`. In cloud mode `exists?/3` returns `{:error, :not_implemented}`, not a boolean, which can break JSON encoding and response shape parity (VAL-CFGSW-005).

The test labeled for API response-shape parity only checks callback presence (`__info__(:functions)`) and does not exercise `/api/health` or `/api/project` responses across backends, so the stated requirement is not directly validated.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission expectations require cloud/local parity for CRUD and API shape (VAL-CFGSW-005 and VAL-CFGSW-007), but the cloud modules are explicitly documented/implemented as stubs returning `:not_implemented`. This mismatch should be recorded clearly in shared mission knowledge to avoid accepting interface-only behavior as parity.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:975-988 requires API/CRUD parity; lib/bropilot/storage/cloud_storage.ex:5-6 and 13/18/23/28/33 return stub errors; lib/bropilot/state/durable_object_state.ex:5-6 and 14/19/24/29 return stub errors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker handoff verification did not include endpoint-level parity checks or cloud CRUD parity despite the feature claiming fulfillment through VAL-CFGSW-007. Skill/process guidance may need stronger enforcement to map verification commands to all feature VAL assertions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoffs/2026-04-06T17-11-46-626Z__config-switching__4ea742a3-c711-4d6a-9137-09beaa3d3a5c.json:20-42 shows only mix test/mix eval checks; no `/api/health` or `/api/project` parity run; same file line 95 maps VAL-CFGSW-005 to interface checks.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill guidance for `config-switching`. Env-based switching and error handling were implemented, but cloud-mode parity requirements are not met: cloud CRUD/state remain stubs and can cause API shape breakage in project space responses. Marking this feature as fail with blocking issues.
